meaning: 罗斯托夫[苏联西南部港市]
examples: The Russian government had called a halt to the construction of a new project in the Rostov region.
As a vice president in the southwestern city of Rostov, he was able to jump-start small-business lending by galvanizing local banks.
Fant and Aleksejs Rostov both picked up their fourth fouls midway through the half, taking seats next to Harper on the Western Kentucky bench.
